Final score: Lakers 91, Mavericks 70

Arthur Kaluma: 34 points, 11/16 FGs, 6/10 3s, 3/3 FTs.

Robbie Avila didn't play

Next up for Lakers: Tuesday vs Clippers

items.body_excerpt: Raps up 11 late against Houston in LVSL. A quieter night for Allen Graves, who has 9 points, 3 rebounds and 5 fouls, but he's in the middle of everything.
